content: INTENT: The user's message was ambiguous and it is not clear what they need. Emotional intensity: {intensity}/10. Ask one gentle, open ended clarifying question to understand better. Be warm and non judgmental. Do not assume what they need. Keep your reply to at most two sentences.
_signed_off: Clinical lead (Rohan Sarda) approved 2026-07-07, L2 engagement batch. CONTENT RATIFICATION only: this is the behaviour-frozen text from PR #124 (the low_confidence composer migration), not an engagement expansion. Its single clarifying question IS the bridge; no second bridge. SAFETY-COUPLED: the two-sentence cap keeps the (suppressed) freeflow guardrail benign on this path; relaxing the cap requires re-enabling that guardrail in the same change. MERGE NOTE: content is byte-identical to PR #124's low_confidence.json, so merge #124 (mechanism) before this batch for a clean version-only diff.
